Footer.tagline: Your local experts for unforgettable Morocco experiences — from the medina of Marrakech to the sands of the Sahara.
Footer.about: Be Flex Travel offers premium travel experiences, private transport, and guided tours across Morocco. We are an official registered travel agency based in Marrakech.
Footer.copyright: © {year} Be Flex Travel. All rights reserved.

hero.description: From camel rides at sunset to Saharan stargazing — Be Flex Travel crafts unforgettable experiences across Morocco with expert local guides.

activities.title: Popular
activities.description: Hand-picked adventures in and around Marrakech — from thrilling to tranquil.

sahara.title: 3-Day Sahara Desert Circuit
sahara.description: Marrakech → High Atlas → Aït Benhaddou → Todra Gorge → Erg Chebbi → Marrakech. Sleep under the Milky Way in a luxury desert camp.

excursions.title: Top
excursions.description: From Atlas mountains to Atlantic coasts — explore Morocco beyond the city.

local.title: Local Knowledge
local.desc: Born and raised in Marrakech. We know the hidden gems, best times to visit, and local secrets no guidebook will tell you.

private.title: Private & Flexible
private.desc: All tours are private — your group, your pace, your schedule. We adapt to you, never the other way around.

reachable.title: Always Reachable
reachable.desc: WhatsApp us anytime — before, during, and after your trip. We reply within 2 hours, always.

photo.title: Photographer's Eye
photo.desc: Our guides know every perfect angle and golden-hour spot. Your holiday photos will be extraordinary.

fees.title: No Hidden Fees
fees.desc: The price you see is the price you pay. No surprise add-ons, no pressure selling on tour.

cancel.title: Free Cancellation
cancel.desc: Plans change — we get it. Cancel or reschedule up to 48 hours before at no cost.

cta.title: Ready to Explore Morocco?
cta.description: Send us a message and we'll craft your perfect itinerary — no obligation, just inspiration.

camelRide.title: Camel Ride in the Palmeraie
camelRide.desc: A timeless journey through Marrakech's golden Palmeraie on camelback at sunset.

quadBiking.title: Quad Biking in the Desert
quadBiking.desc: Race across desert dunes and palm groves on a powerful quad bike.

hotAirBalloon.title: Hot Air Balloon over Marrakech
hotAirBalloon.desc: Soar at dawn over Marrakech's medina with Atlas Mountain views.

cycleBike.title: Electric Cycle Bike Tour
cycleBike.desc: Discover Marrakech's hidden gems on a guided electric bike tour.

sideCar.title: Sidecar Tour of Marrakech
sideCar.desc: Ride through Marrakech in a retro vintage sidecar motorcycle.

hammamSpa.title: Traditional Hammam & Spa
hammamSpa.desc: Experience centuries-old Moroccan bathing rituals in an authentic hammam.

cookingClass.title: Moroccan Cooking Class
cookingClass.desc: Master tagine, couscous & more in a traditional riad kitchen.

paragliding.title: Paragliding over the Atlas
paragliding.desc: Tandem paragliding over Atlas foothills — no experience required.

ourikaValley.title: Ourika Valley & 3 Valleys
ourikaValley.desc: Lush Atlas foothills, waterfalls & authentic Berber villages — 30km from Marrakech.

essaouira.title: Essaouira — The Windy City
essaouira.desc: Atlantic coast UNESCO medina with ramparts, artisan workshops & fresh seafood.

ouzoudWaterfalls.title: Ouzoud Waterfalls
ouzoudWaterfalls.desc: Morocco's highest waterfalls — 110m drop, wild monkeys & natural swimming pools.

atlasOuarzazate.title: Atlas & Ouarzazate — Valley of Roses
atlasOuarzazate.desc: Cross the High Atlas to Hollywood kasbahs, UNESCO sites & the Valley of Roses.

agafayDesert.title: Agafay Desert — Stone Desert
agafayDesert.desc: Lunar stone desert 40 min from Marrakech — quads, camels & Milky Way dinners.

imlil.title: Imlil & Toubkal Foothills
imlil.desc: Trek into Africa's highest mountain foothills through ancient Berber villages.

agadir.title: Agadir & Paradise Valley
agadir.desc: Atlantic beach resort + hidden Paradise Valley gorge with natural swimming pools.

Blog.title: Latest from the
Blog.description: Insights, guides, and practical tips for your Morocco adventure — straight from our local guides.
Blog.bookCTA: Ready to experience this yourself? Let us plan your dream trip.
Blog.noPosts: No articles found in this category.
